description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in business-casual attire, featuring a collared button-up shirt tucked into fitted trousers secured with a belt. The figure has a well-groomed, short hairstyle and a neatly trimmed beard, giving a professional appearance. The shirt is long-sleeved and the trousers are straight-cut, ending just above a pair of formal dress shoes. The hands are relaxed and positioned at the sides, and the overall build is average and proportional. The facial features are defined, with a neutral expression and a clean, symmetrical look. The figure is depicted in a natural, upright standing posture, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, offices, or public spaces.
description: A professionally dressed adult male in a button-up shirt, trousers, and dress shoes, standing upright with a neat hairstyle and beard.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt, belt, facial features, and both arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the straight fit of the trousers, and the side of the shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, belt, and trousers, as well as the back of the head and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and leg alignment from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve button-up shirt and straight-cut trousers with a belt, formal business-casual style
